'''ây-b-m-v''' ('''kayabmevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macarise|macarise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-b-m-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macarise|macarise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-b-m-v
|-
! Lemma
| kayabmevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyabmevoko|thiyabmevoko]] || [[word:jiyabmevoko|jiyabmevoko]] || [[word:shiyabmevoko|shiyabmevoko]] || [[word:kiyabmevoko|kiyabmevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyabmevoko|thuthuyabmevoko]] || [[word:jujuyabmevoko|jujuyabmevoko]] || [[word:shushuyabmevoko|shushuyabmevoko]] || [[word:kukuyabmevoko|kukuyabmevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyabmevoko|thoyabmevoko]] || [[word:joyabmevoko|joyabmevoko]] || [[word:shoyabmevoko|shoyabmevoko]] || [[word:koyabmevoko|koyabmevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyabmevoko|thĂŠyabmevoko]] || [[word:jĂŠyabmevoko|jĂŠyabmevoko]] || [[word:shĂŠyabmevoko|shĂŠyabmevoko]] || [[word:kĂŠyabmevoko|kĂŠyabmevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
